dimensionDescriptions.ai_enabled_social_engineering: Explain how AI-assisted social engineering techniques may increase attacker credibility, speed, or scale and why those changes matter for defensive planning.
dimensionDescriptions.iam_saas_risk: Evaluate identity and SaaS governance exposure such as token policies, conditional access assumptions, or approval controls and how they influence attacker opportunity.
dimensionDescriptions.governance_controls: Consider at least one governance or policy improvement that could reduce risk and briefly explain the responsible role or group for implementation.
dimensionDescriptions.strategic_detection_gap: Identify a monitoring, telemetry-retention, or workflow limitation that may reduce the organization's ability to detect or interpret similar threats.
dimensionDescriptions.business_impact: Translate technical findings into operational or financial consequences that leadership would recognize as meaningful institutional risk.
dimensionDescriptions.defensive_prioritization: Outline which defensive improvements appear most important in the near term and explain the reasoning behind that prioritization.
dimensionDescriptions.tradeoff: Explain a likely operational or usability tradeoff associated with the recommended improvement and how it might be mitigated.
dimensionDescriptions.stakeholder_communication: Present reasoning in language accessible to non-technical decision-makers while preserving analytical clarity.
dimensionDescriptions.risk_reasoning: Explain how impact and likelihood together justify the selected risk level.
dimensionDescriptions.confidence_reasoning: Explain why the confidence level reflects both supporting evidence and remaining uncertainty.
dimensionDescriptions.uncertainty_collection: Identify additional information or validation steps that could clarify the situation or refine the assessment.

reportSections.title: Executive Summary
reportSections.template: Summarize the most likely strategic risk scenario and briefly identify the leadership decision or action that appears most important.

reportSections.title: Threat Trend Interpretation
reportSections.template: Explain how AI-enabled techniques may influence attacker capability, speed, or scale compared with traditional threats.

reportSections.title: Evidence and Assumptions
reportSections.template: Distinguish confirmed observations from assumptions and identify any telemetry or evidence limitations.

reportSections.title: Primary Hypothesis and Alternatives
reportSections.template: Explain the most plausible interpretation and briefly consider at least one alternative explanation.

reportSections.title: Risk Assessment
reportSections.template: Describe potential institutional impact and explain why the situation represents the selected risk level.

reportSections.title: Strategic Detection Gap
reportSections.template: Identify one significant monitoring or visibility limitation and explain why addressing it could improve future threat detection.

reportSections.title: Governance and Control Considerations
reportSections.template: Suggest potential governance or policy improvements that could strengthen organizational resilience.

reportSections.title: Operational Tradeoffs
reportSections.template: Discuss potential operational or usability tradeoffs associated with the recommended improvements.

reportSections.title: Professional Conclusion
reportSections.template: Provide a short set of next steps or strategic considerations for leadership and security teams.

gapRules.prompt: Consider suggesting at least one governance or policy improvement and identifying who might be responsible for implementing it.
You may want to identify one monitoring or visibility limitation that could influence future threat detection.
Consider describing one operational or usability tradeoff associated with the proposed improvements.
You may want to present a concise plain-language explanation of the issue and the recommended action for leadership.
Explain how the available evidence supports the selected risk level using both impact and likelihood considerations.
Explain how the evidence and remaining uncertainty justify the selected confidence level.
